---
title: "Chikv | CellChat results"
author: "Giorgio Gonnella"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: sandstone
params:
  analysis: "1"
  input_step: "07.P.compute_cellchat"
  input_rds: "so_w_cellchat.rds"
  this_step: "07.V.cellchat_results"
  pair: "A_NC_vs_C"
  sfx:  "pfilt"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, echo = FALSE)
withr::with_dir(here::here(), { source("renv/activate.R") })

library(Seurat)
library(CellChat)
library(patchwork)
library(ggplot2)
library(circlize)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(grid)

analysis_root <- here::here(paste0("analysis-", params$analysis,"/"))
input_var_dir <- paste0(analysis_root, "steps/", params$input_step, "/results/vars/")
if (!dir.exists(input_var_dir))
  stop("Input variable directory does not exist: ", input_var_dir)
this_step_dir <- paste0(analysis_root, "steps/", params$this_step, "/")
if (!dir.exists(this_step_dir))
  stop("Current step directory does not exist: ", this_step_dir)

pair_map <- list(
  A_NC_vs_C    = c("A_NC",  "A_C"),
  `6m_NC_vs_C` = c("6m_NC", "6m_C"),
  NC_A_vs_6m   = c("A_NC",  "6m_NC"),
  C_A_vs_6m    = c("A_C",   "6m_C")
)
if (!params$pair %in% names(pair_map))
  stop("Unknown pair: ", params$pair)
if (!params$sfx %in% c("all", "pfilt"))
  stop("Unknown sfx: ", params$sfx)

conds  <- pair_map[[params$pair]]
nm1    <- conds[1]; nm2 <- conds[2]
sfx    <- params$sfx
thresh <- if (sfx == "pfilt") 0.05 else 1

plots_outdir <- paste0(this_step_dir, "results/", params$pair, "/", sfx, "/plots/")
dir.create(plots_outdir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

.fig_counter <- 0L
fig_label <- function(desc = NULL) {
  .fig_counter <<- .fig_counter + 1L
  lbl <- paste0(params$pair, ".", sfx, ".Fig", .fig_counter)
  if (!is.null(desc)) lbl <- paste0(lbl, " \u2014 ", desc)
  cat(paste0("\n\n### ", lbl, "\n\n"))
}
```

```{r helpers}
draw_grid_plot <- function(plt, title) {
  draw(plt, newpage = TRUE, padding = unit(c(0.2, 0.2, 2, 0.2), "cm"))
  grid.text(title, y = unit(1, "npc") - unit(1, "cm"),
            gp = gpar(fontsize = 12))
}

make_pair_ht <- function(cc_left, cc_right, left_title, right_title,
                         pattern = "outgoing", width = 5, height = 6, gap_cm = 0.5) {
  pathway.union <- union(cc_left@netP$pathways, cc_right@netP$pathways)
  ht_left  <- netAnalysis_signalingRole_heatmap(cc_left,  pattern = pattern,
    signaling = pathway.union, title = left_title,  width = width, height = height)
  ht_right <- netAnalysis_signalingRole_heatmap(cc_right, pattern = pattern,
    signaling = pathway.union, title = right_title, width = width, height = height)
  draw(ht_left + ht_right, ht_gap = unit(gap_cm, "cm"))
}

# --- Note helpers ---
# Filtering method used for pfilt:
#   CellChat permutation test (100 permutations per LR pair per sender-receiver pair),
#   p <= 0.05 on communication probability.
# Between-condition statistical test:
#   Wilcoxon rank-sum on per-sample values (two-sided, normal approximation),
#   BH correction for multiple testing where applied.

FILT_METHOD <- paste0("CellChat permutation test on communication probability",
                      " (100 permutations per ligand\u2013receptor pair per sender\u2013receiver pair)")

# --- Per-sample stats infrastructure ---

# group.celltype.vec: maps positions 1:27 (cell types in level order) to 9 cell groups.
# Must match the group.celltype vector used in compute_cellchat.Rmd.
group.celltype.vec <- c(
  rep("B cells",          5),
  rep("CD4+ T cells",     8),
  rep("CD8+ T cells",     4),
  rep("GD T cells",       2),
  rep("MAIT cells",       1),
  rep("NK cells",         1),
  rep("Dendritic cells",  2),
  rep("Monocytes",        3),
  rep("Progenitor cells", 1)
)

# Extract per-sample net matrices, subset to cell types common across all samples.
# Returns NULL if <2 samples per group.
.persample_mats <- function(measure = "count") {
  ps1 <- so@misc[["cellchat_per_sample"]][[nm1]]
  ps2 <- so@misc[["cellchat_per_sample"]][[nm2]]
  if (is.null(ps1) || is.null(ps2) || length(ps1) < 2 || length(ps2) < 2)
    return(NULL)
  all_ps      <- c(ps1, ps2)
  common_cts  <- Reduce(intersect, lapply(all_ps, function(cc) levels(cc@idents)))
  if (length(common_cts) < 2) return(NULL)
  get_mat <- function(cc) {
    idx <- match(common_cts, levels(cc@idents))
    m   <- if (measure == "count") cc@net$count else cc@net$weight
    structure(m[idx, idx, drop = FALSE], dimnames = list(common_cts, common_cts))
  }
  list(mats1 = lapply(ps1, get_mat), mats2 = lapply(ps2, get_mat),
       cts = common_cts, n1 = length(ps1), n2 = length(ps2))
}

# Aggregate per-sample ungrouped matrices to the 9 cell-group level.
.persample_grouped_mats <- function(measure = "count") {
  d <- .persample_mats(measure)
  if (is.null(d)) return(NULL)
  ref_lev  <- levels(so@misc$cc$all[[nm1]]@idents)   # 27 full reference levels
  pos      <- match(d$cts, ref_lev)
  grps     <- group.celltype.vec[pos]
  uniq_grps <- unique(group.celltype.vec)             # 9 groups in order
  agg <- function(m) {
    out <- matrix(0, length(uniq_grps), length(uniq_grps),
                  dimnames = list(uniq_grps, uniq_grps))
    for (i in seq_along(grps))
      for (j in seq_along(grps))
        out[grps[i], grps[j]] <- out[grps[i], grps[j]] + m[i, j]
    out
  }
  list(mats1 = lapply(d$mats1, agg), mats2 = lapply(d$mats2, agg),
       cts = uniq_grps, n1 = d$n1, n2 = d$n2)
}

.fmt_p <- function(p) if (is.null(p) || is.na(p)) "NA" else if (p < 0.001) sprintf("%.2e", p) else sprintf("%.3f", p)
.stars <- function(p) if (is.null(p) || is.na(p)) "" else if (p < 0.001) "***" else if (p < 0.01) "**" else if (p < 0.05) "*" else "ns"

# Wilcoxon rank-sum on per-sample totals (for Fig8-9, Fig18-19).
.wilcox_total <- function(measure = "count") {
  d <- .persample_mats(measure)
  if (is.null(d)) return(NULL)
  t1 <- sapply(d$mats1, sum)
  t2 <- sapply(d$mats2, sum)
  wt <- suppressWarnings(wilcox.test(t1, t2, exact = FALSE))
  list(stat = wt$statistic, p = wt$p.value, n1 = d$n1, n2 = d$n2,
       med1 = median(t1), med2 = median(t2))
}

# Wilcoxon rank-sum per sender-receiver pair with BH correction (for Fig10-13, Fig20-23).
.wilcox_perpair <- function(measure = "count", is_grouped = FALSE) {
  d <- if (is_grouped) .persample_grouped_mats(measure) else .persample_mats(measure)
  if (is.null(d)) return(NULL)
  n    <- length(d$cts)
  pmat <- matrix(NA_real_, n, n, dimnames = list(d$cts, d$cts))
  for (i in seq_len(n)) for (j in seq_len(n)) {
    v1 <- sapply(d$mats1, function(m) m[i, j])
    v2 <- sapply(d$mats2, function(m) m[i, j])
    if (any(c(v1, v2) != 0))
      pmat[i, j] <- tryCatch(
        suppressWarnings(wilcox.test(v1, v2, exact = FALSE)$p.value),
        error = function(e) NA_real_)
  }
  tested <- !is.na(pmat)
  pmat_adj <- pmat
  if (any(tested))
    pmat_adj[tested] <- p.adjust(pmat[tested], method = "BH")
  list(p.adj = pmat_adj, cts = d$cts, n1 = d$n1, n2 = d$n2,
       n_tested = sum(tested))
}

# Wilcoxon rank-sum per pathway (for rankNet label coloring).
# Returns: list(p.adj = named vector, n1, n2) or NULL if not enough samples.
.wilcox_perpathway <- function(pathways = NULL) {
  ps1 <- so@misc[["cellchat_per_sample"]][[nm1]]
  ps2 <- so@misc[["cellchat_per_sample"]][[nm2]]
  if (is.null(ps1) || is.null(ps2) || length(ps1) < 2 || length(ps2) < 2)
    return(NULL)
  # All pathways from either condition
  all_pw <- unique(c(
    unlist(lapply(ps1, function(x) x@netP$pathways)),
    unlist(lapply(ps2, function(x) x@netP$pathways))
  ))
  if (!is.null(pathways)) all_pw <- intersect(all_pw, pathways)
  if (length(all_pw) == 0) return(NULL)
  # Per-sample total signaling weight for each pathway
  get_pw_strength <- function(cc, pw) {
    if (pw %in% cc@netP$pathways) {
      prob <- cc@net$weight  # [sender, receiver] already summed over LR in @net
      # Actually use @netP$prob which is [sender, receiver, pathway]
      pw_idx <- which(dimnames(cc@netP$prob)[[3]] == pw)
      if (length(pw_idx) == 0) return(0)
      sum(cc@netP$prob[,,pw_idx])
    } else 0
  }
  pvals <- sapply(all_pw, function(pw) {
    v1 <- sapply(ps1, get_pw_strength, pw = pw)
    v2 <- sapply(ps2, get_pw_strength, pw = pw)
    if (all(v1 == 0) && all(v2 == 0)) return(NA_real_)
    tryCatch(suppressWarnings(wilcox.test(v1, v2, exact=FALSE)$p.value),
             error=function(e) NA_real_)
  })
  tested    <- !is.na(pvals)
  list(p = pvals, n1 = length(ps1), n2 = length(ps2),
       n_tested = sum(tested), n_sig = sum(pvals <= 0.05, na.rm=TRUE))
}

# Post-process rankNet ggplot: recolor y-axis (pathway) labels by significance.
# gg        — ggplot returned by rankNet
# pw_stats  — result of .wilcox_perpathway()
# thresh    — significance threshold (default 0.05)
.color_ranknet_labels <- function(gg, pw_stats, thresh = 0.05) {
  if (is.null(pw_stats)) return(gg)
  padj <- pw_stats$p
  gg + theme(axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(
    colour = sapply(levels(gg$data$name %||% factor(gg$data$name)), function(pw) {
      p <- padj[pw]
      if (is.na(p) || p > thresh) "black"
      else {
        # Determine direction from data
        d <- gg$data[gg$data$name == pw, ]
        if (nrow(d) == 0) return("black")
        g1 <- sum(d$contribution[d$group == levels(d$group)[1]], na.rm=TRUE)
        g2 <- sum(d$contribution[d$group == levels(d$group)[2]], na.rm=TRUE)
        if (g1 >= g2) "#E41A1C" else "#377EB8"  # red=nm1 stronger, blue=nm2
      }
    })
  ))
}

# Formatted note for the total Wilcoxon test result.
.total_test_note <- function(measure = "count") {
  wt <- .wilcox_total(measure)
  if (is.null(wt)) {
    cat("Between-condition test: not available (need \u22652 samples per group).\n\n")
  } else {
    unit <- if (measure == "count") "total ligand\u2013receptor (LR) interaction count" else "total communication probability"
    sig  <- wt$p < 0.05
    sig_str <- if (sig) {
      paste0("statistically significant (", .stars(wt$p), ")")
    } else {
      "not statistically significant"
    }
    cat(paste0(
      "Between-condition test (", nm1, " vs ", nm2, "): ",
      "Wilcoxon rank-sum on per-sample ", unit,
      " (n\u2081=", wt$n1, ", n\u2082=", wt$n2, " samples; ",
      "W=", wt$stat, ", p=", .fmt_p(wt$p),
      "; median ", round(wt$med1, 1), " vs ", round(wt$med2, 1), "). ",
      "The observed difference between the two conditions is ",
      sig_str, " according to this test.\n\n"
    ))
  }
}

# Per-sample barplot: one bar per sample, colored by condition.
# Draws and prints the ggplot, returns it invisibly.
.persample_barplot <- function(measure = "count", is_grouped = FALSE) {
  d <- if (is_grouped) .persample_grouped_mats(measure) else .persample_mats(measure)
  if (is.null(d)) {
    cat("Per-sample barplot: not available (need \u22652 samples per group).\n\n")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  unit  <- if (measure == "count") "LR interaction count" else "communication probability"
  cond_colors <- c(nm1, nm2)
  vals1 <- sapply(d$mats1, sum)
  vals2 <- sapply(d$mats2, sum)
  # Sort by condition (nm1 first, then nm2), preserving sample order within each
  df <- data.frame(
    value     = c(vals1, vals2),
    sample    = factor(c(names(d$mats1), names(d$mats2)),
                       levels = c(names(d$mats1), names(d$mats2))),
    condition = factor(c(rep(nm1, d$n1), rep(nm2, d$n2)), levels = c(nm1, nm2))
  )
  cond_colors <- setNames(c("#E41A1C", "#377EB8"), c(nm1, nm2))
  wt <- suppressWarnings(wilcox.test(vals1, vals2, exact = FALSE))
  p_label <- paste0("Wilcoxon p = ", .fmt_p(wt$p.value))
  gg <- ggplot(df, aes(x = sample, y = value, fill = condition)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.7) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cond_colors) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = unit, fill = "Condition",
         title = paste0(params$pair, " (", sfx, "): ", unit, " per sample"),
         caption = p_label) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
  print(gg)
  cat(paste0(
    "Total ", unit, " for each individual sample. Samples are colored by condition (",
    nm1, " in red, ", nm2, " in blue). ",
    "The spread of bars within each condition shows within-group variability. ",
    "Between-condition test: Wilcoxon rank-sum, p = ", .fmt_p(wt$p.value), ".\n\n"
  ))
  invisible(gg)
}

# Per-pair test note (text only, for chord diagrams Fig10-11, Fig20-21).
.perpair_chord_note <- function(measure = "count", is_grouped = FALSE) {
  wp <- .wilcox_perpair(measure, is_grouped)
  pair_type <- if (is_grouped) "cell-group" else "cell-type"
  if (is.null(wp)) {
    cat(paste0("*Per-", pair_type, "-pair test: not available",
               " (need \u22652 samples per group).*\n\n"))
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  pmat   <- wp$p.adj
  n_sig  <- sum(pmat <= 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (n_sig == 0) {
    cat(paste0(
      "*Per-", pair_type, "-pair Wilcoxon rank-sum with BH correction ",
      "(n\u2081=", wp$n1, ", n\u2082=", wp$n2, " samples, ",
      wp$n_tested, " pairs tested): no significant pairs (p.adj\u00a0>\u00a00.05).*\n\n"
    ))
  } else {
    sig_idx  <- which(pmat <= 0.05, arr.ind = TRUE)
    pair_str <- apply(sig_idx, 1, function(r)
      paste0(rownames(pmat)[r[1]], "\u2192", colnames(pmat)[r[2]],
             "\u00a0", .stars(pmat[r[1], r[2]])))
    cat(paste0(
      "*Per-", pair_type, "-pair Wilcoxon rank-sum with BH correction ",
      "(n\u2081=", wp$n1, ", n\u2082=", wp$n2, " samples, ",
      wp$n_tested, " pairs tested): ",
      n_sig, " significant pair(s): ",
      paste(pair_str, collapse = "; "), ".*\n\n"
    ))
  }
}

# Significance heatmap figure for differential heatmaps (Fig12-13, Fig22-23).
# Draws a -log10(p.adj) heatmap with asterisk overlay and returns text note.
.sig_heatmap_fig <- function(measure = "count", is_grouped = FALSE) {
  wp <- .wilcox_perpair(measure, is_grouped)
  pair_type <- if (is_grouped) "cell-group" else "cell-type"
  if (is.null(wp)) {
    cat(paste0("*Per-", pair_type, "-pair significance heatmap: not available",
               " (need \u22652 samples per group).*\n\n"))
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  pmat  <- wp$p.adj
  n_sig <- sum(pmat <= 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)
  # Text note
  cat(paste0(
    "*Per-", pair_type, "-pair Wilcoxon rank-sum with BH correction ",
    "(n\u2081=", wp$n1, ", n\u2082=", wp$n2, " samples, ",
    wp$n_tested, " pairs tested): ",
    n_sig, "/", wp$n_tested, " significant at p.adj\u00a0\u22640.05.*\n\n"
  ))
  # Build significance heatmap
  logp      <- matrix(0, nrow(pmat), ncol(pmat), dimnames = dimnames(pmat))
  logp[!is.na(pmat)] <- -log10(pmax(pmat[!is.na(pmat)], 1e-300))
  stars_mat <- matrix("", nrow(pmat), ncol(pmat), dimnames = dimnames(pmat))
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(pmat))) for (j in seq_len(ncol(pmat)))
    if (!is.na(pmat[i, j])) stars_mat[i, j] <- .stars(pmat[i, j])
  thresh  <- -log10(0.05)
  max_val <- max(logp, na.rm = TRUE)
  col_fn  <- circlize::colorRamp2(
    c(0, thresh, max(thresh + 0.01, max_val)),
    c("white", "orange", "red"))
  ht <- Heatmap(
    logp, name = "-log10(p.adj)",
    col  = col_fn,
    cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {
      s <- stars_mat[i, j]
      if (nchar(s) > 0)
        grid.text(s, x, y, gp = gpar(fontsize = if (is_grouped) 9 else 6))
    },
    cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_columns = FALSE,
    row_names_gp    = gpar(fontsize = if (is_grouped) 8 else 6),
    column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = if (is_grouped) 8 else 6),
    column_title    = paste0(nm1, " vs ", nm2, ": significance (", pair_type, " pairs)"),
    heatmap_legend_param = list(
      title_gp  = gpar(fontsize = 8),
      labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 7))
  )
  draw(ht)
  invisible(NULL)
}

.cc_stats <- function(cc_obj, cc_obj_all = NULL, is_grouped = FALSE) {
  pair_label  <- if (is_grouped) "cell-group" else "cell-type"
  n_levels    <- nlevels(cc_obj@idents)
  max_pairs   <- n_levels * n_levels
  n_lr        <- sum(cc_obj@net$count)
  n_pairs     <- sum(cc_obj@net$count > 0)
  n_pw        <- length(cc_obj@netP$pathways)
  if (!is.null(cc_obj_all)) {
    list(n_lr = n_lr, n_pairs = n_pairs, n_pw = n_pw,
         n_lr_all = sum(cc_obj_all@net$count),
         n_pairs_all = sum(cc_obj_all@net$count > 0),
         n_pw_all = length(cc_obj_all@netP$pathways),
         max_pairs = max_pairs, pair_label = pair_label)
  } else {
    list(n_lr = n_lr, n_pairs = n_pairs, n_pw = n_pw,
         n_lr_all = NULL, n_pairs_all = NULL, n_pw_all = NULL,
         max_pairs = max_pairs, pair_label = pair_label)
  }
}

# For single-condition overview heatmaps (Fig1-4, Fig14-17):
# netVisual_heatmap — matrix of LR count or comm. probability per sender-receiver pair.
interaction_note <- function(cc_obj, nm, cc_obj_all = NULL, is_grouped = FALSE) {
  s <- .cc_stats(cc_obj, cc_obj_all, is_grouped)
  note <- if (sfx == "pfilt" && !is.null(cc_obj_all)) {
    n_filt_lr <- s$n_lr_all - s$n_lr
    n_filt_pw <- s$n_pw_all - s$n_pw
    pct_lr    <- paste0(round(100 * n_filt_lr / max(s$n_lr_all, 1)), "%")
    paste0(
      "*", nm, ":* ",
      "*ligand\u2013receptor (LR) interactions:* ", s$n_lr, "/", s$n_lr_all, " retained (",
        n_filt_lr, " removed, ", pct_lr, "); ",
      "*active ", s$pair_label, " pairs:* ", s$n_pairs, "/", s$n_pairs_all,
        " (", s$n_pairs_all - s$n_pairs, " lost all significant interactions); ",
      "*pathways:* ", s$n_pw, "/", s$n_pw_all,
        " (", n_filt_pw, " lost all significant ligand\u2013receptor pairs). ",
      "*Filter:* p\u00a0\u22640.05, ", FILT_METHOD, "."
    )
  } else {
    paste0(
      "*", nm, ":* ",
      "*ligand\u2013receptor (LR) interactions:* ", s$n_lr, "; ",
      "*active ", s$pair_label, " pairs:* ", s$n_pairs, "/", s$max_pairs, "; ",
      "*pathways:* ", s$n_pw, ". ",
      "*No p-value filtering applied.*"
    )
  }
  cat(paste0(note, "\n\n"))
}

# For signaling role heatmaps (Fig6-7):
# netAnalysis_signalingRole_heatmap — rows: pathways (union of both conditions),
# cols: cell types, values: outgoing/incoming contribution score.
signaling_role_note <- function(pattern) {
  pw1   <- cc[[nm1]]@netP$pathways
  pw2   <- cc[[nm2]]@netP$pathways
  pw_un <- union(pw1, pw2)
  filt_txt <- if (sfx == "pfilt")
    paste0("pathways retained after p\u00a0\u22640.05 filtering (", FILT_METHOD, ")")
  else
    "all pathways, no p-value filtering"
  cat(paste0(
    "*Rows:* union of ", length(pw_un), " pathways (",
    nm1, ": ", length(pw1), "; ", nm2, ": ", length(pw2), "). ",
    "*Columns:* cell types. ",
    "*Values:* ", pattern, " signaling contribution score per cell type per pathway ",
    "(from netAnalysis_computeCentrality on communication probability). ",
    "*Pathway set:* ", filt_txt, ".\n\n"
  ))
  pair_note()
}

# For compareInteractions bar charts (Fig8-9, Fig18-19):
# Shows total LR count or total communication probability per condition (one bar each).
# Statistical test: Wilcoxon rank-sum on per-sample totals.
compare_note <- function(measure = "count", is_grouped = FALSE) {
  obj1 <- if (is_grouped) grouped[[nm1]] else cc[[nm1]]
  obj2 <- if (is_grouped) grouped[[nm2]] else cc[[nm2]]
  obj1_all <- if (sfx == "pfilt") (if (is_grouped) grouped_all[[nm1]] else cc_all[[nm1]]) else NULL
  obj2_all <- if (sfx == "pfilt") (if (is_grouped) grouped_all[[nm2]] else cc_all[[nm2]]) else NULL
  unit <- if (measure == "count") "total ligand\u2013receptor (LR) interactions" else "total communication probability"
  cat(paste0(
    "*Bars show ", unit, " per condition (summed across all ",
    if (is_grouped) "cell-group" else "cell-type", " pairs).*\n\n"
  ))
  .total_test_note(measure)
  interaction_note(obj1, nm1, obj1_all, is_grouped)
  interaction_note(obj2, nm2, obj2_all, is_grouped)
}

# For differential chord/arrow plots (Fig10-11, Fig20-21):
# netVisual_diffInteraction — arrow/edge direction and thickness encode
# the signed difference: positive (red) = more in nm1, negative (blue) = more in nm2.
# Statistical test: Wilcoxon rank-sum per sender-receiver pair with BH correction.
diff_chord_note <- function(measure = "count", is_grouped = FALSE) {
  unit <- if (measure == "count") "ligand\u2013receptor (LR) interaction count" else "communication probability"
  filt_note <- if (sfx == "pfilt")
    " Only ligand\u2013receptor interactions significant by CellChat permutation test (p\u00a0\u22640.05) are included."
  else ""
  cat(paste0(
    "Differential ", unit, " (", nm1, " \u2212 ", nm2, ") per ",
    if (is_grouped) "cell-group" else "cell-type",
    " pair. Red/outgoing arrows: higher in ", nm1,
    "; blue/outgoing arrows: higher in ", nm2,
    ". Edge width scaled by magnitude.", filt_note, "\n\n"
  ))
  if (is_grouped) grouped_pair_note() else pair_note()
}

# For differential heatmaps (Fig12-13, Fig22-23):
# netVisual_heatmap(merged_cc) — matrix of signed difference per sender-receiver pair.
diff_heatmap_note <- function(measure = "count", is_grouped = FALSE) {
  unit <- if (measure == "count") "ligand\u2013receptor (LR) interaction count" else "communication probability"
  filt_note <- if (sfx == "pfilt")
    " Only ligand\u2013receptor interactions significant by CellChat permutation test (p\u00a0\u22640.05) are included."
  else ""
  cat(paste0(
    "Differential ", unit, " per ",
    if (is_grouped) "cell-group" else "cell-type",
    " pair (", nm1, " \u2212 ", nm2,
    "). Positive (red): higher in ", nm1,
    "; negative (blue): higher in ", nm2,
    ".", filt_note, "\n\n"
  ))
  if (is_grouped) grouped_pair_note() else pair_note()
}

pair_note <- function() {
  interaction_note(cc[[nm1]], nm1, if (sfx == "pfilt") cc_all[[nm1]] else NULL,
                   is_grouped = FALSE)
  interaction_note(cc[[nm2]], nm2, if (sfx == "pfilt") cc_all[[nm2]] else NULL,
                   is_grouped = FALSE)
}

grouped_note <- function(nm) {
  interaction_note(grouped[[nm]], nm, if (sfx == "pfilt") grouped_all[[nm]] else NULL,
                   is_grouped = TRUE)
}

grouped_pair_note <- function() {
  grouped_note(nm1)
  grouped_note(nm2)
}
```

```{r load_so}
so <- readRDS(file = paste0(input_var_dir, params$input_rds))
cc          <- so@misc$cc[[sfx]]
cc_all      <- so@misc$cc$all
merged_cc   <- so@misc$cc_merged[[sfx]][[params$pair]]
grouped     <- so@misc$cc_grouped[[sfx]]
grouped_all <- so@misc$cc_grouped$all
grouped_merged <- so@misc$cc_grouped_merged[[sfx]][[params$pair]]
ranknet_obj <- so@misc$cc_ranknet_merged[[params$pair]]
has_ranknet_stats <- !is.null(ranknet_obj)
```

```{r report_title, results='asis'}
pair_labels <- c(
  A_NC_vs_C  = "Non-Chronic Acute vs Chronic Acute",
  `6m_NC_vs_C` = "Non-Chronic 6 months vs Chronic 6 months",
  NC_A_vs_6m = "Non-Chronic Acute vs Non-Chronic 6 months",
  C_A_vs_6m  = "Chronic Acute vs Chronic 6 months"
)
sfx_labels <- c(all = "unfiltered", pfilt = "p-value filtered")
cat(paste0("# ", pair_labels[[params$pair]], " - ", sfx_labels[[params$sfx]], "\n\n"))
```

# Single condition overviews

## Overview heatmaps

```{r overview_render, include=FALSE}
overview_items <- list()
for (nm in c(nm1, nm2)) {
  outdir <- file.path(plots_outdir, "overview", nm)
  dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  for (measure in c("count", "weight")) {
    lbl_m    <- if (measure == "count") "Interaction counts" else "Interaction weight"
    fstem    <- paste0(nm, ".", sfx, ".heatmap_", measure)
    png_path <- file.path(outdir, paste0(fstem, ".png"))
    pdf_path <- file.path(outdir, paste0(fstem, ".pdf"))
    ttl      <- paste0(nm, " (", sfx, "): ", lbl_m)
    plt      <- if (measure == "count") netVisual_heatmap(cc[[nm]]) else
                                        netVisual_heatmap(cc[[nm]], measure = "weight")
    png(png_path, width = 700, height = 700)
    draw_grid_plot(plt, ttl)
    invisible(dev.off())
    pdf(pdf_path, width = 7, height = 7)
    draw_grid_plot(plt, ttl)
    invisible(dev.off())
    overview_items[[length(overview_items) + 1]] <-
      list(nm = nm, measure = measure, lbl = lbl_m, png = png_path)
  }
}
```

```{r overview_display, results='asis'}
for (item in overview_items) {
  .fig_counter <<- .fig_counter + 1L
  lbl <- paste0(params$pair, ".", sfx, ".Fig", .fig_counter,
                " \u2014 ", item$nm, ": ", item$lbl)
  cat(paste0("\n\n### ", lbl, "\n\n",
             "![](", item$png, ")\n\n"))
  interaction_note(cc[[item$nm]], item$nm,
                   if (sfx == "pfilt") cc_all[[item$nm]] else NULL)
}
```

# Comparison: `r nm1` vs `r nm2`

## Pathway ranking (rankNet)

```{r ranknet, fig.width=12, fig.height=7, results='asis'}
pw <- if (sfx == "pfilt") union(cc[[nm1]]@netP$pathways, cc[[nm2]]@netP$pathways) else NULL
n_pw_all   <- length(union(so@misc$cc$all[[nm1]]@netP$pathways,
                            so@misc$cc$all[[nm2]]@netP$pathways))
n_pw_shown <- if (is.null(pw)) n_pw_all else length(pw)
n1 <- length(so@misc[["cellchat_per_sample"]][[nm1]])
n2 <- length(so@misc[["cellchat_per_sample"]][[nm2]])

# Always use merged_cc for the plot (clean condition-level legend: nm1 / nm2).
# Per-sample Wilcoxon rank-sum is computed separately and used to recolor pathway labels.
gg1 <- rankNet(merged_cc, mode = "comparison", measure = "weight",
               stacked = TRUE,  do.stat = FALSE, signaling = pw, thresh = thresh)
gg2 <- rankNet(merged_cc, mode = "comparison", measure = "weight",
               stacked = FALSE, do.stat = FALSE, signaling = pw, thresh = thresh)

# Per-pathway Wilcoxon across samples → color labels red/blue/black
pw_stats <- .wilcox_perpathway(pathways = pw)
if (!is.null(pw_stats)) {
  gg1 <- .color_ranknet_labels(gg1, pw_stats, thresh = 0.05)
  gg2 <- .color_ranknet_labels(gg2, pw_stats, thresh = 0.05)
}

fig_label(paste0(params$pair, ": Pathway ranking"))
print((gg1 + gg2) +
  plot_annotation(title = paste0(params$pair, ": Pathway ranking (", sfx, ")")))

# --- Note ---
pw_note <- if (sfx == "pfilt") {
  paste0("Pathways shown: ", n_pw_shown,
         " with at least one significant ligand\u2013receptor interaction ",
         "(CellChat permutation test, p\u00a0\u22640.05; ",
         n_pw_all - n_pw_shown, " pathways removed as entirely non-significant)")
} else {
  paste0("Pathways shown: ", n_pw_shown, " (all pathways, unfiltered)")
}
panel_note <- paste0(
  "Left panel: relative information flow per pathway per condition. ",
  "Right panel: absolute information flow (communication probability).")
if (!is.null(pw_stats)) {
  stat_note <- paste0(
    "Between-condition test: Wilcoxon rank-sum comparing per-sample pathway signaling strength ",
    "across ", nm1, " (n\u2081=", pw_stats$n1, " samples) vs ", nm2, " (n\u2082=", pw_stats$n2, " samples). ",
    "Raw p-values are reported without multiple-testing correction: ",
    "with only ", pw_stats$n1, "\u2013", pw_stats$n2, " samples per group and ",
    pw_stats$n_tested, " pathways tested, BH correction is too conservative ",
    "as the Wilcoxon test has limited power at this sample size. ",
    "Raw p\u00a0<\u00a00.05 is used as an exploratory threshold; ",
    pw_stats$n_sig, " pathway(s) pass this threshold. ",
    "Pathway label colors: **red** = stronger in ", nm1, " (raw p\u00a0<\u00a00.05)",
    "; **blue** = stronger in ", nm2, " (raw p\u00a0<\u00a00.05)",
    "; black = raw p\u00a0\u22650.05 (not significant at this threshold).")
} else {
  stat_note <- if (n1 >= 2 && n2 >= 2) {
    "Between-condition test: could not be computed."
  } else {
    paste0("Between-condition test: not available (need \u22652 samples per group; ",
           "n\u2081=", n1, ", n\u2082=", n2, "). ",
           "Label colors reflect relative magnitude only: **red** = higher in ", nm1,
           "; **blue** = higher in ", nm2, " (no significance threshold).")
  }
}
cat(paste0("*", pw_note, ". ", panel_note, " ", stat_note, "*\n\n"))
```

## Signaling role heatmaps

```{r signaling_role_heatmaps, fig.width=12, fig.height=9, results='asis'}
fig_label(paste0(params$pair, ": Signaling role heatmap (outgoing)"))
make_pair_ht(cc[[nm1]], cc[[nm2]], left_title = nm1, right_title = nm2,
             pattern = "outgoing", width = 10, height = 12, gap_cm = 1.5)
signaling_role_note("Outgoing")
fig_label(paste0(params$pair, ": Signaling role heatmap (incoming)"))
make_pair_ht(cc[[nm1]], cc[[nm2]], left_title = nm1, right_title = nm2,
             pattern = "incoming", width = 10, height = 12, gap_cm = 1.5)
signaling_role_note("Incoming")
```

## Comparison plots

```{r comparison_plots, fig.width=12, fig.height=10, results='asis'}
outdir <- file.path(plots_outdir, "comparisons")
dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

fig_label(paste0(params$pair, ": Number of interactions"))
gg1 <- compareInteractions(merged_cc, show.legend = FALSE, group = c(1,2)) +
  ggtitle(paste0(params$pair, " (", sfx, "): Number of interactions"))
print(gg1)
ggsave(file.path(outdir, paste0(params$pair, ".", sfx, ".compareInteractions_count.pdf")),
       plot = gg1, width = 7, height = 5)
compare_note(measure = "count", is_grouped = FALSE)
fig_label(paste0(params$pair, ": Number of interactions per sample"))
.persample_barplot(measure = "count", is_grouped = FALSE)

fig_label(paste0(params$pair, ": Interaction strength"))
gg2 <- compareInteractions(merged_cc, show.legend = FALSE, group = c(1,2), measure = "weight") +
  ggtitle(paste0(params$pair, " (", sfx, "): Interaction strength"))
print(gg2)
ggsave(file.path(outdir, paste0(params$pair, ".", sfx, ".compareInteractions_weight.pdf")),
       plot = gg2, width = 7, height = 5)
compare_note(measure = "weight", is_grouped = FALSE)
fig_label(paste0(params$pair, ": Interaction strength per sample"))
.persample_barplot(measure = "weight", is_grouped = FALSE)

fig_label(paste0(params$pair, ": Differential number of interactions"))
pdf(file.path(outdir, paste0(params$pair, ".", sfx, ".diffInteraction_count.pdf")),
    width = 12, height = 10)
op <- par(mar = c(2, 2, 6, 2), xpd = NA)
netVisual_diffInteraction(merged_cc, weight.scale = TRUE)
par(op); invisible(dev.off())
op <- par(mar = c(2, 2, 6, 2), xpd = NA)
netVisual_diffInteraction(merged_cc, weight.scale = TRUE)
title(paste0(params$pair, " (", sfx, "): Differential number of interactions"),
      cex.main = 1.4, line = 2)
par(op)
diff_chord_note(measure = "count", is_grouped = FALSE)

fig_label(paste0(params$pair, ": Differential interaction strengths"))
pdf(file.path(outdir, paste0(params$pair, ".", sfx, ".diffInteraction_weight.pdf")),
    width = 12, height = 10)
op <- par(mar = c(2, 2, 6, 2), xpd = NA)
netVisual_diffInteraction(merged_cc, weight.scale = TRUE, measure = "weight")
par(op); invisible(dev.off())
op <- par(mar = c(2, 2, 6, 2), xpd = NA)
netVisual_diffInteraction(merged_cc, weight.scale = TRUE, measure = "weight")
title(paste0(params$pair, " (", sfx, "): Differential interaction strengths"),
      cex.main = 1.4, line = 2)
par(op)
diff_chord_note(measure = "weight", is_grouped = FALSE)

fig_label(paste0(params$pair, ": Differential interaction counts heatmap"))
plt   <- netVisual_heatmap(merged_cc)
ttl   <- paste0(params$pair, " (", sfx, "): Differential interaction counts")
draw_grid_plot(plt, ttl)
pdf(file.path(outdir, paste0(params$pair, ".", sfx, ".diff_heatmap_count.pdf")),
    width = 7, height = 7)
draw_grid_plot(plt, ttl); invisible(dev.off())
diff_heatmap_note(measure = "count", is_grouped = FALSE)

fig_label(paste0(params$pair, ": Differential interaction weights heatmap"))
plt   <- netVisual_heatmap(merged_cc, measure = "weight")
ttl   <- paste0(params$pair, " (", sfx, "): Differential interaction weights")
draw_grid_plot(plt, ttl)
pdf(file.path(outdir, paste0(params$pair, ".", sfx, ".diff_heatmap_weight.pdf")),
    width = 7, height = 7)
draw_grid_plot(plt, ttl); invisible(dev.off())
diff_heatmap_note(measure = "weight", is_grouped = FALSE)
```

# Grouped cell types

## Grouped overview heatmaps

```{r grouped_overview_render, include=FALSE}
grouped_overview_items <- list()
for (nm in c(nm1, nm2)) {
  outdir <- file.path(plots_outdir, "overview_grouped", nm)
  dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  for (measure in c("count", "weight")) {
    lbl_m    <- if (measure == "count") "Interaction counts" else "Interaction weight"
    fstem    <- paste0(nm, ".", sfx, ".grouped_heatmap_", measure)
    png_path <- file.path(outdir, paste0(fstem, ".png"))
    pdf_path <- file.path(outdir, paste0(fstem, ".pdf"))
    ttl      <- paste0(nm, " (", sfx, "): ", lbl_m, " (grouped)")
    plt      <- if (measure == "count") netVisual_heatmap(grouped[[nm]]) else
                                        netVisual_heatmap(grouped[[nm]], measure = "weight")
    png(png_path, width = 700, height = 700)
    draw_grid_plot(plt, ttl); invisible(dev.off())
    pdf(pdf_path, width = 7, height = 7)
    draw_grid_plot(plt, ttl); invisible(dev.off())
    grouped_overview_items[[length(grouped_overview_items) + 1]] <-
      list(nm = nm, measure = measure, lbl = lbl_m, png = png_path)
  }
}
```

```{r grouped_overview_display, results='asis'}
for (item in grouped_overview_items) {
  .fig_counter <<- .fig_counter + 1L
  lbl <- paste0(params$pair, ".", sfx, ".Fig", .fig_counter,
                " \u2014 ", item$nm, " grouped: ", item$lbl)
  cat(paste0("\n\n### ", lbl, "\n\n",
             "![](", item$png, ")\n\n"))
  grouped_note(item$nm)
}
```

## Grouped comparison

```{r grouped_comparison_plots, fig.width=12, fig.height=10, results='asis'}
outdir <- file.path(plots_outdir, "comparisons_grouped")
dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

fig_label(paste0(params$pair, " grouped: Number of interactions"))
gg1 <- compareInteractions(grouped_merged, show.legend = FALSE, group = c(1,2)) +
  ggtitle(paste0(params$pair, " (", sfx, "): Number of interactions (grouped)"))
print(gg1)
ggsave(file.path(outdir, paste0(params$pair, ".", sfx, ".grouped_compareInteractions_count.pdf")),
       plot = gg1, width = 7, height = 5)
compare_note(measure = "count", is_grouped = TRUE)
fig_label(paste0(params$pair, " grouped: Number of interactions per sample"))
.persample_barplot(measure = "count", is_grouped = TRUE)

fig_label(paste0(params$pair, " grouped: Interaction strength"))
gg2 <- compareInteractions(grouped_merged, show.legend = FALSE, group = c(1,2), measure = "weight") +
  ggtitle(paste0(params$pair, " (", sfx, "): Interaction strength (grouped)"))
print(gg2)
ggsave(file.path(outdir, paste0(params$pair, ".", sfx, ".grouped_compareInteractions_weight.pdf")),
       plot = gg2, width = 7, height = 5)
compare_note(measure = "weight", is_grouped = TRUE)
fig_label(paste0(params$pair, " grouped: Interaction strength per sample"))
.persample_barplot(measure = "weight", is_grouped = TRUE)

fig_label(paste0(params$pair, " grouped: Differential number of interactions"))
pdf(file.path(outdir, paste0(params$pair, ".", sfx, ".grouped_diffInteraction_count.pdf")),
    width = 12, height = 10)
op <- par(mar = c(2, 2, 6, 2), xpd = NA)
netVisual_diffInteraction(grouped_merged, weight.scale = TRUE)
par(op); invisible(dev.off())
op <- par(mar = c(2, 2, 6, 2), xpd = NA)
netVisual_diffInteraction(grouped_merged, weight.scale = TRUE)
title(paste0(params$pair, " (", sfx, "): Differential interactions (grouped)"),
      cex.main = 1.4, line = 2)
par(op)
diff_chord_note(measure = "count", is_grouped = TRUE)

fig_label(paste0(params$pair, " grouped: Differential interaction strengths"))
pdf(file.path(outdir, paste0(params$pair, ".", sfx, ".grouped_diffInteraction_weight.pdf")),
    width = 12, height = 10)
op <- par(mar = c(2, 2, 6, 2), xpd = NA)
netVisual_diffInteraction(grouped_merged, weight.scale = TRUE, measure = "weight")
par(op); invisible(dev.off())
op <- par(mar = c(2, 2, 6, 2), xpd = NA)
netVisual_diffInteraction(grouped_merged, weight.scale = TRUE, measure = "weight")
title(paste0(params$pair, " (", sfx, "): Differential strengths (grouped)"),
      cex.main = 1.4, line = 2)
par(op)
diff_chord_note(measure = "weight", is_grouped = TRUE)

fig_label(paste0(params$pair, " grouped: Diff interaction counts heatmap"))
plt <- netVisual_heatmap(grouped_merged)
ttl <- paste0(params$pair, " (", sfx, "): Differential interaction counts (grouped)")
draw_grid_plot(plt, ttl)
pdf(file.path(outdir, paste0(params$pair, ".", sfx, ".grouped_diff_heatmap_count.pdf")),
    width = 7, height = 7)
draw_grid_plot(plt, ttl); invisible(dev.off())
diff_heatmap_note(measure = "count", is_grouped = TRUE)

fig_label(paste0(params$pair, " grouped: Diff interaction weights heatmap"))
plt <- netVisual_heatmap(grouped_merged, measure = "weight")
ttl <- paste0(params$pair, " (", sfx, "): Differential interaction weights (grouped)")
draw_grid_plot(plt, ttl)
pdf(file.path(outdir, paste0(params$pair, ".", sfx, ".grouped_diff_heatmap_weight.pdf")),
    width = 7, height = 7)
draw_grid_plot(plt, ttl); invisible(dev.off())
diff_heatmap_note(measure = "weight", is_grouped = TRUE)
```

# Session info

```{r session_info, echo=FALSE}
sessionInfo()
```
